PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AOKI, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOLLIN, GEOFFREY $43,833.65 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,833.65, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S). SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED APR-10-2012. (PER ORDER FILED ON 7/31/12)
REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOS. TO MTN TO VACATE AND SET ASIDE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FOLLIN, GEOFFREY

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR FEB-25-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-22-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AOKI, KENNETH JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GEOFFREY FOLLIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST IS TIMELY, AND RELIEF IS MANDATORY BASED ON DEFENDANT COUNSEL'S AFFIDAVIT OF MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. C.C.P. 437(B). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GEOFFREY FOLLIN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS Granted. The request is timely, and relief is mandatory based on Defendant counsel's affidavit of mistake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect. C.C.P. 437(b). ORDER SIGNED.
